summary: First iteration testing of Zen Marinero website. All 8 backend pytest tests passed (root, reservations, contact, jobs with/without CV, admin auth, admin verify, CV download). Frontend verified end-to-end: homepage loads with all sections and data-testids, Reserve dialog opens and submits successfully, Menu dialog opens with PDF buttons, Employment form submits successfully, WhatsApp link uses correct +34622442301 wa.me URL, Instagram links all point to https://www.instagram.com/zenmarinero/. Admin /admin route shows error toast on wrong token and successfully loads Reservas/Contacto/Empleo tabs with submitted data on correct token (zenmarinero2026). Resend email skip works gracefully (no API key present, submissions still 200).
critical_code_review_comments: ReservationDialog inputs lack granular data-testid (only reservation-dialog testid exists). Adding data-testid for name/email/phone/date/time/guests/submit would improve testability. Selectors by name attr currently work.
send_email_safe uses asyncio.to_thread for resend.Emails.send which is correct; OWNER_EMAIL is required in addition to RESEND_API_KEY for emails to fire — note in docs.
uploads dir at /app/backend/uploads is local-disk; consider note in PRD about persistence across redeploys.
CORSMiddleware uses CORS_ORIGINS='*' which is fine for preview but should be tightened for production.
seed_data_creation: Created via API tests: TEST_Resv reservation, TEST_Contact contact, TEST_Job (with PDF CV) and TEST_JobNoCV job applications. Plus one UI-submitted reservation 'TEST UI' and one UI-submitted job 'TEST JobUI'. All visible in admin panel.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest at /app/backend/tests/test_zen_marinero.py (8 tests, all green). Admin token zenmarinero2026. Test data uses TEST_ prefix. Note ReservationDialog uses native inputs by name= rather than data-testid for individual fields; if you need granular tests, ask main agent to add per-field data-testids.
